title: attribution — HTTP routes
description: Tenant-facing attribution reads + admin actions (merge / reset / import) + campaign rollup + user-facing my-attribution + platform-admin cross-tenant support routes. Every tenant-plane route carries `entitlement.enforce:attribution_capture` at minimum; rollup routes additionally require `attribution_rollup` (Medium+); merge route requires `attribution_merge` (Enterprise); import route requires `attribution_import` (Enterprise).

groups.name: tenant-attributions
groups.description: Attribution profile reads + admin actions. Admin + marketing + owner see aggregated rollups; individual subjects see only their own via /me/attribution.

routes.description: filter[subject_type], filter[lifecycle_state], filter[first_touch_source], filter[first_touch_campaign], filter[last_touch_source], filter[last_touch_campaign], filter[created_at.gte], filter[created_at.lte]. Marketing role gets aggregated view (no PII); admin + owner see full rows.
Full profile view. Confidential fields redacted unless caller has attribution.view-confidential.
The touchpoint history for one attribution. Ordered captured_at DESC. Pagination cursor. filter[touchpoint_type], filter[was_conversion].
Body: { from_attribution_ids: string[], reason? }. Enterprise-only (attribution_merge entitlement). Dispatches MergeIdentifiedAttributionsJob synchronously + returns 202 with the job ID for polling.

Body: { reason, subject_confirms_gdpr_request: true }. GDPR right-to-erasure path. Redacts the profile immediately + schedules touchpoint hard-delete 90 days out. Fires AttributionResetRequested + AttributionResetConfirmationNotification. Duplicate resets return 409 ATTRIBUTION_RESET_IN_PROGRESS.

Enterprise-only. Body: multipart file upload (CSV, max 50k rows). Each row creates a fresh attributions + attribution_touchpoints record. Returns 202 with the import job ID. Refuses rows failing schema validation (returns 422 with per-row error report).
Compliance-team report. filter[from], filter[to], filter[consent_state_summary]. Aggregated counts + per-day breakdown. NO PII.

groups.name: tenant-me-attribution
groups.description: User-facing self-serve attribution surface. GDPR Art. 15 right of access.

routes.description: Return the caller's own attribution profile with FULL confidential fields (they own their own data — no redactor).
Return the caller's own touchpoint timeline.
GDPR right-to-erasure for own attribution. Body: { reason?, subject_confirms_gdpr_request: true }.

groups.name: tenant-campaigns-rollup
groups.description: Campaign performance rollup dashboards. Medium+ (attribution_rollup entitlement).

routes.description: Aggregated campaign performance. ?window=24h|7d|30d. filter[source_bucket], filter[medium]. Returns { campaign, source, medium, touchpoints, conversions, first_touches } rows sorted by touchpoints DESC.
Deep dive on one campaign. ?window=24h|7d|30d. Returns per-source + per-medium breakdown + daily time-series + top-N first-touch subjects (aggregated — no PII).

groups.name: platform-attributions
groups.description: Cross-tenant read for support tooling + force-reset for regulator-issued erasure requests.

routes.description: Support-only escape hatch. Bypasses tenant guards. Regulator-issued erasure requests. Notifies tenant admin + writes audit row with 7-year retention. Body: { reason, regulator_reference }.
